creator: benwy@clear.net.nz
text:
The list of forums on the page http://www.freebsd.org/news/news.html lists an outdated forum BSDForums.org. This site has been abandoned in favour of daemonforums.org. The reasons behind the move are detailed in threads on the respective sites.

At the very least, http://daemonforums.org/, "Deamon Forums", needs to be listed on that page as the current BSDForums is full of spam and the majority of members have migrated to the new site anyway.

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: n/a
